title: Weekly Rise In Political Insider Buying In Healthcare Stocks Signals Upcoming Sector Strength
thesis: An uptick in insider purchases suggests confidence in upcoming healthcare sector fundamentals or policy tailwinds. Insiders often buy before positive sector moves driven by innovation or regulation.
data_sources: Insider filing weekly aggregated data for healthcare sector via political_insider_filing adapter
signal_logic: If weekly insider buying volume exceeds 20% above 10-week average
entry_exit: Entry: If weekly insider buying volume exceeds 20% above 10-week average Exit: Once buying volume falls below 5% above 10-week average
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Insider filing weekly aggregated data for healthcare sector via political_insider_filing adapter via api (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Insider buying activity shows consistent weekly variation with regular buying bursts.

schema.behavior: An uptick in insider purchases suggests confidence in upcoming healthcare sector fundamentals or policy tailwinds.

market_impact.rationale: Insiders often buy before positive sector moves driven by innovation or regulation.

trade_logic.entry: If weekly insider buying volume exceeds 20% above 10-week average
trade_logic.exit: Once buying volume falls below 5% above 10-week average

schema.reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Insider buying activity shows consistent weekly variation with regular buying bursts.

title: Weekly Surge In Freight Logistics Congestion Index Signals Industrial Sector Pressure
thesis: A sharp weekly increase in freight congestion often precedes supply chain bottlenecks, slowing manufacturing output. Industrial sector earnings rely heavily on smooth freight logistics; congestion constrains growth.
data_sources: Freight congestion index weekly data via html_table adapter
signal_logic: If weekly congestion index rises more than 5% compared to prior week
entry_exit: Entry: If weekly congestion index rises more than 5% compared to prior week Exit: Once congestion index falls below 2% weekly change
position_sizing: Allocate 5% per signal, max 20% total exposure.
risks: Data source instability, false positives, and regime shifts.
implementation_notes: Use Freight congestion index weekly data via html_table adapter via scrape (weekly).
reason_it_will_fire_in_30_days: Freight congestion varies regularly with ongoing supply chain disruptions and seasonal factors.

trade_logic.exit: Once congestion index falls below 2% weekly change
